heading: Certifications and determinations on transferred records
label: 3104 Certifications and determinations on transferred records
text: An official of the Government who is authorized to certify to facts on the basis of records in such official’s custody, may certify to facts on the basis of records that have been transferred by such official or such official’s predecessors to the Archivist, and may authorize the Archivist to certify to facts and to make administrative determinations on the basis of records transferred to the Archivist, notwithstanding any other law.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 396(d) (, title V, § 506(d), as added , , and amended , , ).June 30, 1949, ch. 288Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 6(d)64 Stat. 583Pub. L. 88–26578 Stat. 8Feb. 5, 1964

Amendments2014— substituted “such official’s custody” for “his custody” and “such official or such official’s predecessors” for “him or his predecessors”.Pub. L. 113–1871984— substituted “Archivist” for “Administrator of General Services” and “Archivist” for “Administrator” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 98–497
Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–497section 301 of Pub. L. 98–497section 2102 of this titleApr. 1, 1985
